mapper.select: SELECT /* base.sy :: SyUserRole :: selectById */ r.* , usr.user_nm AS user_nm , rol.role_nm AS role_nm , usr2.user_nm AS grant_user_nm FROM sy_user_role r LEFT JOIN sy_user usr ON usr.user_id = r.user_id LEFT JOIN sy_role rol ON rol.role_id = r.role_id LEFT JOIN sy_user usr2 ON usr2.user_id = r.grant_user_id WHERE r.user_role_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SyUserRole :: selectByUserId */ r.* , rol.role_nm AS role_nm , rol.role_code AS role_code , usr2.user_nm AS grant_user_nm FROM sy_user_role r LEFT JOIN sy_role rol ON rol.role_id = r.role_id LEFT JOIN sy_user usr2 ON usr2.user_id = r.grant_user_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.grant_date DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) /* base.sy :: SyUserRole :: selectPageCount */ FROM sy_user_role r
